form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last campaign came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on January 29 2025 over 1005m, 2.75 len behind Red Evolution with 57.5kg at $41. When resuming last campaign 13th of 19 at Navan on October 9 2024 over 1207m, 13 len behind Majestic Wave carrying 51.5kg at $67. Worth including among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd in a small field at this track on March 28 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Aqpan carrying 57.5kg at $7. Shapes as a leading chance.

form.formComment: First-starter by Bungle Inthejungle out of Lady Cashback. Betting is the best pointer to his chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Bungle Inthejungle out of Lady Cashback. Betting is the best pointer to his chances.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 11 at Newbury on April 11 over 1030m, 0.5 len behind Inca Heights with 60.5kg at $10. Returned from break 3rd in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on March 11 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Merlier with 56.5kg at $1.90. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last in a small field at Newcastle All Weather on March 11 over 1000m, 11 len behind Merlier with 55.5kg at $23. Out of her depth again.

form.formComment: First-starter by Night Of Thunder out of Queen Jo Jo. Prefer to just watch barring a strong market move.

form.formComment: First-starter by Havana Grey out of Likelihood. Hard to recommend without a market push.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Havana Grey out of Likelihood. Hard to recommend without a market push.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 3rd of 7 at this track on March 13 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind La Belle Forest with 56kg at $4.30. The run before that 2nd of 9 at this track on February 24 over 1000m, head behind Hayynah carrying 56kg at $41. Has good early speed and will take some running down.
